protocol.name: AIMS WIT Issuance Flow
protocol.description: Agent Identity Management System - Workload Identity Token (WIT) issuance via SPIRE. An agent obtains a WIT credential bound to its SPIFFE ID through workload attestation.

entities.name: AI Agent Workload
entities.description: AI agent workload requesting identity credentials

entities.name: SPIRE Agent
entities.description: Local SPIRE agent that attests workloads and manages credentials

entities.name: SPIRE Server
entities.description: Central SPIRE server that issues SVIDs and manages trust domain

entities.name: Node/Workload Attestor
entities.description: Attestation plugin that verifies workload identity (K8s, TPM, etc.)

phases.name: Workload Attestation
phases.description: Agent proves its runtime identity to SPIRE

phases.name: WIT Issuance
phases.description: SPIRE issues a JWT-SVID (WIT) bound to the agent's SPIFFE ID

flows.label: FetchJWTSVID (audience, SPIFFE ID)
flows.description: Agent requests a JWT-SVID via SPIRE Workload API

flows.label: Attest Workload (PID, UID, K8s SA, etc.)
flows.description: SPIRE agent uses attestor plugin to verify workload identity

flows.label: Gather Attestation Evidence
flows.description: Collect platform evidence (K8s token, TPM quote, etc.)

flows.label: FetchSVID Request (workload selectors)
flows.description: Request SVID based on attested workload selectors

flows.label: Match Registration Entry
flows.description: Find registration entry matching workload selectors

flows.label: Create WIT (iss, sub=SPIFFE ID, aud, exp, cnf)
flows.description: Create JWT-SVID with SPIFFE ID as subject and key binding

flows.label: Sign with Trust Domain Key
flows.description: Sign WIT using trust domain signing key

flows.label: Workload Identity Token
flows.description: Return WIT with SPIFFE ID and audience binding
